programme.title: Modern Family: A Slight at the Opera

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Rogue Nation
programme.desc: While Pride remains on probation six weeks after his rogue takedown of the corrupt Mayor Hamilton, his team is closely monitored. Also, when the FBI arrives to run lead on a case involving a stolen rig of nuclear waste the team must investigate.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: #1 Fan
programme.desc: While preparing to leave on a fishing trip, Martha Roberts, an erratic whistleblower who calls Pride her mentor, kidnaps him to help her locate a serial killer targeting young women in the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: Movie: A Taste of Summer

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ring a Ding Ding
programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City
programme.desc: A couple's plan to have a small wedding gets blown way out of proportion when the bride is asked to model wedding dresses for Vogue magazine. The groom's cold feet result in the bridal party going off to Mexico without him.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Cross-Country Delivery
programme.desc: On the menu for Guy and his son today, there's a Wild West Virginia weenie, a new spin on a burger from Charlotte, N.C., a Miami Asian-barbecue mashup and a righteous baloney sandwich from Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wonder Women
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's visiting an all-female lineup that's rockin' the house. In Houston, a grandma's firing up family recipes like homemade tamales and chile rellenos with a twist. In Orlando, Florida, a funky spot is focused on making meatball masterpieces.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Aces of Authenticity
programme.desc: Guy hits up some joints that are authentic to the bone. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-raised Chimayan owner turns out traditional dishes like blue corn enchiladas with red chilli sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One of a Kind
programme.desc: Guy visits Massachusetts where people line up for whole-belly clams, and Michigan for chicken gizzards.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' Capital Cities
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out cuisine in capital cities, starting in Juneau, Alaska, at an Italian spot with an Alaskan twist pairing pappardelle with king crab. In Richmond, a classic deli cookin' modern tastes like duck pierogis and Jewish egg rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Steaks and Chops
programme.desc: Guy looks at burgers and steaks in San Francisco and Cambridge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out the combos that make some local hangouts a hit. In Denver, the double-duty corner bar smoking pork for its biscuits and topping pizzas with the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Servin' Up San Francisco
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. First, Guy swings by the repurposed garage in the Mission District for some southern hospitality.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Alaska
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son, Hunter, are taking a culinary journey up to Juneau, Alaska. They're divin' into everything from a family-run, wood-fired pizza wagon making reindeer pie to a funky basement spot mashin' up Latin-Asian fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Taste of Asia
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's gettin' a big taste of the Far East. In Las Vegas, the city's original Japanese spot rolls out serious sushi and traditional udon. Then, a Vegas winner is dealin' in righteous pork, and see an Asian spin on classic grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' the Extra Mile
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' to some joints going all-in on some classic comfort foods. In Chicago, the burger joint with Asian flare proudly serves all things umami. In Memphis, a high-end chef takes low-down Southern staples to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Chow
programme.desc: Guy's quest is covering the country. In Charleston, S.C., a breakfast hangout does a chicken-fried biscuit and a shrimp BLT. In Chicago, a 40-year-old institution is busting out traditional German specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Authentic Eats
programme.desc: Guy finds real deal authentic eats in St. Louis and Syracuse.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Bites
programme.desc: Guy's rolling up to some joints pulling out all the stops. In New York's East Village, the neighbourhood spot plating up a standout burger is worthy of a four star review.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Things New York
programme.desc: Guy's gets a taste of New York in and out of the Big Apple, including Eureka, California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Goes Tailgatin'
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits a Raiders home game for tailgating with chefs from three local joints. They're bringing the kitchen to the blacktop and cranking out chicken and waffles, double chili cheeseburgers and steak sandwiches with jalapeno pesto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Flavortown Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits some of the best of Flavortown, starting in San Diego, where an Asian-inspired noodle house is takin' over the neighborhood. In New Orleans, a neighborhood bistro bounces back from Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Pot Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts things off internationally as he brings the whole family to his favourite jerk joint in Ocho Rios, Jamaica. Then it's back to the States, where a cafeteria in Tucker, Ga. hasn't changed a thing - including its true Southern staples.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Chili Three Ways
programme.desc: Guy Fieri crosses the border to Vancouver, British Columbia, to check in on an authentic Chinese place and see if their thousand chili chicken is as spicy as it sounds.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Barbecue Chicken Pan Pizza
programme.desc: Rachael's barbecue chicken pan pizza is the perfect mix of salty, sweet, tangy and sharp. She bakes the dough in cast iron until it's crispy and tops it with barbecue chicken, mozzarella and cheddar cheese with a finishing of honey and cilantro.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Chicken Cacciatore for the Soul
programme.desc: Colton Underwood is an ex-football player who now runs a non-profit to benefit people living with cystic fibrosis.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Perfect Plate of Summer
programme.desc: Summer foods are in the spotlight as The Kitchen creates a perfect plate of summer favourites. Sunny makes her London Broil with Tomato and Fennel, and Katie serves up Bacon and Ranch Potato Salad. The gang shares three new toppings for grilled corn.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Picnic at the Vineyard
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is wining and dining her friends who are visiting from Las Vegas. They're headed to Arrington Vineyards, co-owned by Trisha's friend, country singer Kix Brooks, and Trisha makes a picnic with roasted beet and dill dip and pasta salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl's Brunch
programme.desc: Molly treats her girlfriends to her favourite brunch dishes after a night out in Grand Forks. There's mini quiches with peas and bacon, garlicky lemony kale and a dark chocolate scone loaf with marzipan for a sweet treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 3
programme.desc: Ree puts a spin on two family favourites in her quick and easy spinach artichoke chicken, she makes a crisp parmesan salad bowl, and her shortcut pretzel dogs are officially Ladd-approved. She finishes off on a sweet note with 'fried' ice cream.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Out

programme.title: The Goldbergs: You Opened the Door
programme.desc: When Adam and Dana decide to attend their first school dance together, Beverly makes a huge deal out of it and decides she has to help chaperone the event. To prepare for the big night, Adam goes to his mother for advice, but soon regrets his decision.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Muscles Mirsky
programme.desc: Beverly and Erica come to an agreement about trusting one another after Erica plays a prank on her "smother"' involving a fake entry in her diary. However, their deal is soon off when Erica sneaks off to a college party, and the situation goes awry.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Back Story
programme.desc: The Conner household is in disarray when Roseanne is bedridden with a back injury.

programme.title: Roseanne: Less Is More
programme.desc: Roseanne struggles to show Dan the kindness in his father's lies about his mother.

programme.title: Roseanne: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne are relieved to have Mark out of their life when he and Becky break up.

programme.title: Roseanne: This Old House
programme.desc: Roseanne and Jackie say emotional farewells to their childhood house, which is slated for demolition. Meanwhile, Roseanne is concerned when Darlene strikes up a friendship with David, the younger brother of Becky's ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Commercial Show
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to convince her boss Leon that she and her family are perfect to star in a commercial for the coffee shop. Meanwhile, D.J. is upset when he discovers his friend from next door is moving to Chicago.

programme.title: Roseanne: Therapy
programme.desc: Jackie's therapist wants to have a word with Roseanne. It seems Roseanne is determined that Jackie start dating dull tax accountant Art, even though Jackie has no interest in him.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lies
programme.desc: Roseanne feels left out when Darlene seeks advice from Dan about her relationship with David. Also an investigation into thefts at Rodbell's Coffee Shop leaves Roseanne worried about passing a lie detector test.

programme.title: Roseanne: Deliverance
programme.desc: Crystal is ready to deliver her baby, but Roseanne gets delayed at work, so Dan steps in as delivery room coach.

programme.title: Roseanne: Secrets
programme.desc: Dan tells Roseanne a lie to cover up a secret: he helped Becky's ex-boyfriend, Mark, out of a difficulty when the young man got drunk and in trouble over his romantic problems with Becky.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Make Me Over
programme.desc: A glamorous Roseanne emerges from her Mother's Day makeover at the Beauty Box, only to discover Becky and Darlene have an ulterior motive behind their very thoughtful gift.

programme.title: Roseanne: Aliens
programme.desc: Becky is distraught when Roseanne and Dan inform her that their economic woes have put her college plans on hold.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan try to keep laughing so they won't start crying as their motorcycle shop goes out of business. Meanwhile, Becky's boyfriend Mark is offered a fabulous job in another state, so they decide to elope.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to lift Dan's spirits when he feels like a failure over the loss of his motorcycle shop. Also, Becky and Mark return from their elopement to face a bitter Dan and Roseanne.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Dark Ages
programme.desc: When the Conners can't pay their electric bill, they're left in the dark, literally.

programme.title: Roseanne: Mommy Nearest
programme.desc: Roseanne and Jackie's mother comes to town with shocking news. She's moving to Lanford! To ease the blow, she's giving her children thousands of dollars. Also, Jackie begins dating a much younger man.

programme.title: Roseanne: Pretty in Black
programme.desc: It's Darlene's sweet sixteen and Roseanne plans a nightmarish surprise party. In a futile attempt at revenge, Darlene dyes her hair jet black. Meanwhile, Roseanne entertains the notion of investing in Jackie's business idea.

programme.title: Roseanne: Looking for Loans in All the Wrong Places
programme.desc: Roseanne and Jackie have trouble securing a bank loan for the business, and their worst nightmare becomes a reality - they must turn to their mother for help. Mom agrees under one condition; she wants to be a partner!

programme.title: Roseanne: Halloween IV
programme.desc: After refusing to take part in the spooky festivities, Roseanne is visited by the ghosts of Halloween Past, Present, and Future.

programme.title: Roseanne: Ladies' Choice
programme.desc: Roseanne begins to feel her age when her mom moves into a retirement home. Meanwhile, Nancy drops a bombshell on Roseanne and Jackie by confessing to her relationship with another woman.

programme.title: Roseanne: Stand on Your Man
programme.desc: Arnie attempts to win back Nancy. Roseanne feels she must tell him Nancy is gay. When a stranger threatens Roseanne at The Lunch Box, Jackie insists that she, Roseanne and Nancy enroll in a self-defense class.

programme.title: Roseanne: Good Girls, Bad Girls
programme.desc: Darlene attends a rock concert with Molly, but is left to find her own way home when Molly meets a boy. Dan and Roseanne are worried sick when Darlene returns home hours late with an excuse they don't believe.

programme.title: Roseanne: Of Ice and Men
programme.desc: Dan takes to the ice to help D.J. win a position on the Junior Hockey League team, but D.J.'s position is generally on the floor. Meanwhile, Roseanne's patience is put to the test helping Jackie recover from a broken romance.

programme.title: Roseanne: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Dan is summoned to D.J.'s principal's office when he is caught with obscene reading materials - which he got from Darlene! Meanwhile, Roseanne learns a shocking secret when she presses Jackie about spending time with Fisher.

programme.title: Roseanne: War and Peace
programme.desc: Dan's in jail for beating up Jackie's boyfriend, Fisher, and Darlene relishes the moment when she has to bail him out. Meanwhile, Roseanne convinces Jackie to leave her abusive boyfriend.

programme.desc: Don Wildman uncovers the most macabre secret of the Wild West, investigates a blood-sucking beast and examines a religious icon scorched by the forces of evil.

programme.title: Beyond the Unknown: The Yeti's Hand, Crop Circles of the Deep and the Riddle of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Don sheds light on the chilling mission to hunt down the world's most legendary beast, investigates strange patterns on the ocean floor and reveals the secret behind the origins Stonehenge.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Mile High Club
programme.desc: Josh and Matt Altman land the biggest mansion in Bradbury Estates. Madison battles structural problems and mold to sell a friend's house in Brentwood. The Brits throw a party for their penthouse listings, but sparks fly when Altman and Flagg face off.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Keys to the Castle
programme.desc: Tracy heads to New York to be mentored by Fredrik Eklund, and to pitch herself to Douglas Elliman President Howard Lorber for a slew of new high-rise projects in L.A. Altman tackles the beast of Bradbury Estates, Bliss Canyon.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Love and Listings
programme.desc: Flagg and Bobby work together on their first co-list and Flagg gets emotional during their wedding rehearsal diner. Tracy's ex-client comes crawling back, while Josh Altman faces a tough deadline to sell a tear-down on the Riviera Golf Course.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: The Brits host a luxurious open house for their $45 million dollar Bel Air listing, and sparks fly when Flagg and Altman come face to face. Madison gets creative in selling a Malibu Country home, while Flagg and Bobby tie the knot in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.title: Movie: Office Space
programme.desc: A computer programmer's sudden professional nonchalance leads to bizarre success.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Drumming Up Buyers
programme.desc: With an increasingly volatile stock market and home prices in a free fall, selling homes has never been harder for these top agents in New York City. Fredrik's found a potentially big score near billionaire's row, but it's got design from the '80's.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: A New York Upstate of Mind
programme.desc: Ryan views a seven-storey townhouse featuring an incredible indoor pool, but being honest with the seller about the price may prevent him from making a splash. Upstate, Steve spares no expense on his brokers' event of the Payne Estate.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Tech-nical Difficulties
programme.desc: Ryan pitches his brand new seven-story Chelsea townhouse as a smart-home paradise for tech enthusiasts, but soon finds himself squaring off with Steve's boss in a tense negotiation. Luis and Ronita explore the idea of reuniting, as business partners.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Jess We Can
programme.desc: Luis and Ronita orchestrate private showings for their first co-listing together, but he steals the show; Ryan lands luxury properties, but is burdened with rental units; Steve's own apartment becomes his latest listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Construction Criticism
programme.desc: Steve puts on a rubber mask to observe Jess at her first broker's open house, but when he's forced to deliver some bad news about the listings, his true character emerges. Fredrik follows a lead for his Tribeca listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: The Weight Is Over

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Polar Opposites
programme.desc: Ryan interviews eager agents for his new team, but following a call from his seller to discuss a lack of offers, Ryan may be the one in the hot seat. Steve and his friend, Phil, hit the gym and end up on an offer that leaves them pumped, and more.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Better Laight than Never
programme.desc: Fredrik hustles to get offers during his disco-themed open house on Charlton St., but the party gets real funky when Ryan arrives for a dance-off. Steve takes a novel approach to selling by hosting a book-launch open house at his new building for artists.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: As Steve works tirelessly to install an elevator in his new listing, the ups-and-downs of negotiating the final price might leave him stuck without a deal. Meanwhile, Tyler hosts a morning open house for his latest Central Park listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Coast Stories

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Loss Angeles
programme.desc: Ryan nervously premieres a music video for his Tribeca loft, but worries that his dancing skills might not be in step with buyers' expectations.

programme.desc: Cooper arranges for the Glamtronics to perform at the annual Firefighters' Ball, but it winds up being the same night of Peyton's going away party.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Jessie: The Talented Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: Despite being weary of Ravi's seven-foot Asian water monitor lizard, Jessie comes to the lizard's rescue after the head of the condo board attempts to ban him from the building. Meanwhile, Zuri brings home another imaginary friend.

programme.title: Jessie: One Day Wonders
programme.desc: After a music producer spots Jessie singing a song she wrote, she is over the moon with excitement about the possibility that her big break has finally arrived. Meanwhile, Bertram enlists Emma to help style him for his social network profile photo.

programme.title: Jessie: Zuri's New Old Friend

programme.title: Jessie: World Wide Web of Lies

programme.title: Bunk'd: We Can't Bear It!

programme.title: Bunk'd: O Sister, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Ravi helps Matteo overcome his fears using hypnosis, but Matteo's newfound confidence could get him into trouble.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Cav'd In

programme.title: Bunk'd: By All Memes

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil and Bobbi Parker

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Inside Man
programme.desc: A smooth convict was offered a deal as tempting as it was dangerous: get key information from a suspected serial killer to win your freedom. The catch; he'd have to go undercover in a psychiatric prison with no guarantee of getting out alive.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Family Affair
programme.desc: When the wealthy heir to a legendary hotel is murdered, the list of possible suspects is long. He had his share of enemies, and a complicated family. Investigators soon learned someone close to the victim was also in danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in South Beach
programme.desc: Wendy Trapaga was a beaming young bride. Then, just four days after saying 'I do' she was found dead in a parking lot. Investigators discovered the newlyweds were keeping secrets. There was also someone else with a secret and it was combustible.

programme.title: Snapped: Jasmine Harlee
programme.desc: An investigation into the mysterious death of a loving mother leads authorities to uncover a diabolical plot hatched close to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Patterson
programme.desc: After an endearing World War II veteran and family man is laid to rest from apparent natural causes, a surprise witness surfaces with murder accusations, sparking a police investigation into a devious predator.

programme.title: Snapped: Theresa Voss

programme.desc: Wendy Trapaga was a beaming young bride. Then, just four days after saying 'I do' she was found dead in a parking lot. Investigators discovered the newlyweds were keeping secrets. There was also someone else with a secret and it was combustible.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Other Zodiac
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs. Police race against time before he can achieve twelve killings to complete the Zodiac.

programme.title: Snapped: Tammy Cole
programme.desc: An old flame comes back to rekindle a romance and ends up charged with murder and arson.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Gaiser
programme.desc: A wife is the target of three assassination attempts, and her husband and his lover point the fingers at each other.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Stredney
programme.desc: A former college teaching assistant kidnaps and shoots her fiancé after he breaks off the engagement.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Gilliam
programme.desc: A wife is charged with killing her husband, an attorney with financial woes, but was it a suicide, and was she wrongly accused.

programme.title: Snapped: Caren Pressley-Brown
programme.desc: A respected business owner snaps, turning a bitter custody fight into a plot for murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Behind the Locked Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found in her locked apartment with 20-stab wounds. The Medical Examiner classifies her death as murder. But when the M.E. later changes the ruling to suicide, the decision forces her family into the fight of their lives.

programme.desc: First responders are called to the fatal shooting of a 28-year-old woman. Her estranged husband claims their bizarre sex game ended in suicide. Investigators and the victim's family believe this was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Judy Flanagan

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Exploring everything from animal oddities to crazy weather, medical marvels and remarkable natural phenomena, host Chris Packham, uncovers the world's weirdest events, including a man who gets drunk without touching a drop of alcohol.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris unearths a whirlwind wedding ceremony, some exploding rocks and a woman's twin inside her brain.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham reveals how deadly poisonous frogs can saves lives, why we see faces in everything and how one woman's pants spontaneously burst into flame.

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris discovers the secrets behind a flame-filled firenado, unearths a very bizarre looking living rock and meets a team of oversized rats who save lives.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Best of The Hunt

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Unholy Trinity
programme.desc: Every year, close to 70,000 people are processed through the five facilities that make up the Orange County Jail. Some will call the jail home until their cases are resolved in court a process that can take years.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Murder and Miracles
programme.desc: One inmate launches a near fatal attack after being in jail for less than an hour. A father accused of murdering his daughter admits to keeping her corpse with him for two years.

programme.title: Lockup: Tulsa Extended Stay: Shackled Love
programme.desc: One inmate's troubled past leads to angry outbursts inside the jail, while another arrives after an alleged crime spree that sounds like it's right out of a movie. And a young mother could go to prison if she's found guilty of robber.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: The Confession

programme.title: Why We Hate: Origins
programme.desc: Evolutionary anthropologist Brian Hare searches for the origins of hate in our distant past, and in our contemporary environment.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Tribalism
programme.desc: Cognitive scientist Laurie Santos examines tribalism, asking why love for our group can make us hate other groups, such as politics, sports, even warfare, and how tribal thinking shapes our perceptions.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Tools and Tactics
programme.desc: Journalist and author Jelani Cobb investigates how 'hate tools' like propaganda, dehumanization, the internet, symbols, and more can incite, amplify and spread hatred.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Extremism
programme.desc: Extremism expert Sasha Havlicek explores the complicated factors that draw people toward ideologies that fuel hate and violence.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Crimes Against Humanity
programme.desc: International criminal lawyer Patricia Viseur Sellers investigates the role of perpetrators in genocides and crimes against humanity, from leaders to followers, as well as those who resist the power of hate.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Hope
programme.desc: Neuroscientist Emile Bruneau explores how we can use our capacity for critical thinking, our brain plasticity, and strategies like education and cooperation to help combat hatred.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Death Watch
programme.desc: These Deadly Women get their kicks from the suffering of others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A beautiful face can mask the ugliest of intentions.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: Unholy Matrimony
programme.desc: When a woman joins a church in Florida looking for spiritual guidance, she is offered it by the church's enigmatic married pastor. Their friendship quickly develops into something more.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Unholy Matrimony
programme.desc: When a woman joins a church in Florida looking for spiritual guidance, she is offered it by the church's enigmatic married pastor. Their friendship quickly develops into something more.

programme.title: Home Alone: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: Single mom Erin installs a security system when she realizes that someone's been inside her home. But that doesn't stop the intruder from breaking in, determined to end her life as well as his own.

programme.title: Home Alone: Portrait of a Stalker
programme.desc: In 2007, 17-year old Katie is living in Tennessee with her doting parents. But Katie's been keeping secrets, and her parents are shocked to discover she's being stalked by an ex-boyfriend they didn't know existed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Gone
programme.desc: Claiming to be desperate to find the missing mother of his child, a Texas man talks with Dr. Phil, but within hours he tells police a much different story.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Devil's Island
programme.desc: An ex-marine with a secret life has a girlfriend who goes missing in Panama.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Fabio?
programme.desc: Fabio Sementilli was a beloved hairstylist and beauty executive who was murdered while relaxing near his pool. Michelle Miller investigates his murder and the hunt for his killers.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Sender: Unknown
programme.desc: 12-year-old Justin Bloxom is addicted to MySpace and attached to his cell phone. One night, Justin sneaks out of a friend's house to meet a new friend, but never returns. The investigation unravels a tangled web of fake identities and false promises.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Age, Sex, Location
programme.desc: 13 year-old Kacie Woody meets two male friends via the internet – Scott, from Atlanta; and Dave, a surfing enthusiast from California. But one of these boys is not what he seems, as Kacie's innocent online contacts turn to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Mr. Fix It
programme.desc: City-girl Leslie Belkin moves south and meets a man on Craigslist. At first George seems perfect - he's nice and helpful around the yard. But once she discovers his criminal record, she realizes she isn't the only casual encounter George has made online.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Right Back
programme.desc: When Alicia DeBolt goes missing, a helpful neighbor points the finger at an older kid she's been hanging out with. When police discover a string of texts on her cell phone, the net closes in on a sadistic killer whose obsession leads to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Lost Rider
programme.desc: Autumn Pasquale, 12, loves her new BMX and networks with fellow fans online for tips and tricks to deck it out. But on Homecoming Day 2012, Autumn - and her beloved new bike - go missing. A trail is left behind on Facebook, but where will it lead?

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crime Scene Selfie
programme.desc: 23-year-old Amanda Taylor shares her entire life on the internet. Following a terrible tragedy, her posts begin take a dark turn.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Dangerous Houses
programme.desc: 18-year-old Brookelyn Farthing disappears in 2013 after attending a party in the small town of Berea, Kentucky. And then, 24-year-old Lindsay Buziak, a young beautiful realtor, is found brutally killed after showing some new clients a million-dollar home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Down the Hill
programme.desc: 13-year-old Abby Williams and 14-year-old Libby German go for a short walk on a popular hiking trail and then disappear. And then 13-year-old Dylan Redwine vanishes on Thanksgiving break, 2012, while visiting his dad in Vallecito, Colorado.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be a Car Salesman
programme.desc: An ex-con rebuilds his reputation as a successful car salesman until a freak accident threatens to send him back to jail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in a Love Triangle
programme.desc: Henry Lee Marshall is obsessed with Martha Leathers, and in a fit of jealousy, kills her husband and flees. Unable to stay away for long, Marshall returns to harass her. Finally, after nine years of stalking Martha, his time on the run comes to an end.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Taunt the Cops
programme.desc: Jimmy Maxwell is no stranger to prison life. But every time he gets arrested, he outsmarts officials and escapes. His go-for-broke nature makes him a menace for authorities, who come face to face with his volatile nature each time they corner him.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Den
programme.desc: Beau Dunavant bought a piece of land in Tres Piedras, New Mexico, as a gift for his girlfriend, Samantha Inman, where they can build a home made of mostly recycled materials and lots of dirt.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: With the help of a small crew, Cal and Billy Joe battle the elements as they race to finish Cal's cabin in time for hunting season. However, an unexpected setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Home for the Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team jump at the opportunity to buy a friend's 100-year-old farmhouse in Manchester, ME, and transform it into their headquarters. They plan to create a showroom, offices and a special space where Ashley can design and create custom pieces.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Family Recipes
programme.desc: Some secret family recipes are just meant to be shared, like the secret behind Graeter's rich and creamy ice cream. Get the lowdown on how Mrs. T's Pierogies turned a classic Polish dish into the American dream.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Secret Center
programme.desc: Join host Alfonso Ribeiro as he explores foods with secret centers. From the gooey middle of the Mallo Cup to the creamy goodness of a peppermint cream or the surprisingly complex filling in a Mini Beef Wellington.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Candy Critters
programme.desc: Gophers and bunnies and butterflies oh my! Even a vegetarian will want to snack on these creatures. Catch cheerful Albanese gummy butterflies in action and pop in on Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Game Day Munchies

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Go Nuts
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro and Unwrapped 2.0 go nuts for nuts! Tumbled in sugar, nestled in chocolate, whatever you do with nuts, it's hard to go wrong. Find out how one candy bar did active military duty in WW1.

programme.desc: A chance encounter with the supernatural butler Whisper opens 5th grader Nate's eyes to a whole new world of Yo-kai spirits, including the cheeky cat Jibanyan.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Battle Royal 151
programme.desc: The Alola Pokémon League is off to a rousing start with a Battle Royal competition among friends and rivals both old and new.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Valentine's Dance/ Green Streets
programme.desc: At the Valentine’s Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Catch

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Family Affair

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation

programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out
programme.desc: In Northern California, the Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of the Olson-Wilcox family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Marty tackles an off-grid hydropower system. Matt creates a meat smoker. One of the Raneys is injured in a surprise accident.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Stop Touching My Stuff!
programme.desc: For 16-year-old Haley, it takes less than a week to fill a bedroom. Her parents hope that a visit with an extreme hoarder who has lost everything will scare their daughter straight.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Owned by the Roaches
programme.desc: Celia is a psychologist who helps other but can't solve her own hoarding problem. She is losing the battle against her stuff and the millions of roaches infesting her home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Unbelievable
programme.desc: Mary has been evicted and has just weeks to clean out decades of stuff or have her home condemned.

programme.title: Dragnificent!: Mermaid Fantasy
programme.desc: With a birthmark covering half her body, Sarah thought she'd never be a bride. That changed when she met Nelson. Then, a surprise pregnancy led to a courthouse ceremony, and now she needs the Queens' help to fulfill her under-the-sea vow renewal dreams.

programme.title: Dragnificent!: One Tough Bride
programme.desc: Corrine is a tough wrestler who hides her insecurities behind her wrestling persona. The queens give her an incredible bridal transformation with the confidence to be her true self on her wedding day.

programme.title: Dragnificent!: Fly Butterfly, Fly
programme.desc: Amy is throwing herself a butterfly party to celebrate losing 130 pounds. Despite shedding the weight, she doesn't feel beautiful. Amy needs the Queens to help her with a new attitude, wardrobe and glam to fulfill her butterfly fantasy.

programme.title: Dragnificent!: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: Laura, a college professor, is struggling to connect with her son, who wants to be a drag queen. Desperate to understand why anyone would want to become a drag queen, Laura calls the Queens for help. They soon realize Laura needs a lot of help of her own.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...And Something Blue

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: All in the Name of Love

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Embargos and Ultimatums

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: It's Go Time

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Big Expectations
programme.desc: Jenny arrives in India but Sumit might have cold feet. Paul finally arrives in Brazil and surprises Karine. Laura drops a bomb on her brother, revealing some big news. Tiffany is off to South Africa hoping she's made the right decision for her son.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go

programme.title: Hoarders: Carrie/ James
programme.desc: Carrie's hoarding stems from a long string of abuse at the hands of family members. James is an ex-Marine who insists that he is not a hoarder.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joanne/ Kristy
programme.desc: The trauma of dealing with Joanne's hoarding was so bad for her daughter that she developed post-traumatic stress disorder. After experiencing the horror of assault, Kristi began shopping to escape her pain.

programme.title: Hoarders: Shanna and Lynda
programme.desc: Shanna owns the worst hoard in 'Hoarders' history - a house crammed floor to ceiling with bottles filled with human waste. Meanwhile, Lynda is hoarding stuff for the Armageddon.

programme.title: Hoarders: Fuzzie and Fredd/ Nancy
programme.desc: Fuzzie and Fredd have been living like teenagers and have stuffed their home with records, toys, comic books and more. Tired of supporting them, Fuzzie's father wants them to clean up. Also, Nancy's hoard is out of control with dirty clothes and cobwebs.

programme.title: Hoarders: Judy
programme.desc: Judy's life is a dangerous one of severe contradictions. She is an extreme germaphobe who spends her entire day engaged in sanitization rituals, yet she lives in a severe and extremely filthy hoard overridden with mice that she considers her friends.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sandi and Vivian
programme.desc: Sandi is known as the town's Mrs. Claus over the holidays. However, she has taken her alter ego to the extreme with her gift hoarding compulsion.

programme.title: Hoarders: Phyllis/ Janet
programme.desc: Phyllis' house is packed with a floor to ceiling collection of bags stuffed with dolls. Janet has to crawl over mountains of garbage to get to the one recliner where she eats and sleeps.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ron/ Carol
programme.desc: Ron's home is filled from top to bottom with paper--books, old newspapers and more. Carol has been sleeping in a hoarded truck parked in front of her condemned hoarded house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Roxann and Barbara
programme.desc: Roxann is a vibrant, beautiful 32-year old mother and former model who has successfully hidden her hoarding until now. She fears Child Protective Services will intervene if she doesn't clean up her hoarded home.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Mama
programme.desc: Kate, a successful businesswoman, learns that she is infertile when she decides that she can no longer wait for Mr. Right to have a baby. When she runs out of options, Kate hires an obnoxious surrogate to carry her baby.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: Professional Help
programme.desc: Mary and Deb meet with business consultants to help Tirdy Works grow. Meanwhile, back at home, Katie expresses interest in joining the wrestling team.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Demo Crazy
programme.desc: Sara Schaefer knows what not to say in a search party, Joel Kim Booster explains why your grandpa doesn't trust him, and Yassir Lester knows all about Joel's longest relationship.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Show Some Respect
programme.desc: Dave Hill confesses who he has on the brain, J.P. McDale tales a shot at Dave's career, and Ali Kolbert reveals her side hustle.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Almost Genius: If at First You Don't Succeed
programme.desc: From a piano-playing horse, to a cliff jumper who thinks he's Mary Poppins, we're watching those who give it their all and still come up short.

programme.title: Almost Genius: So Close Yet So Far
programme.desc: Chris and April celebrate those who shoot for the moon and hit a tree on the way down. A failure to launch has never been so fun.

programme.title: Almost Genius: No Cigar
programme.desc: From a dad with a DIY rollercoaster, to the world's smallest gymnast, this show highlights those brave souls who think on their feet but don’t always land on them.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Standing Ovation
programme.desc: Chris and April give a round of applause to those who aren't quite ready for the spotlight. See a group of friends who get sexy on the slip 'n slide, a dolphin Don Juan, and a funeral dance party.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 14

programme.title: Las Vegas: It's Not Easy Being Green
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts an environmentally friendly conference. When Delinda tries to go green at home, Danny puts up a fight.

programme.title: Las Vegas: My Uncle's a Gas
programme.desc: Danny finds it difficult to keep up with the job, when he gets a surprise visit from the fire marshal and his alcoholic uncle.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The High Price of Gas
programme.desc: A look at the elite surveillance team in charge of maintaining security at a large casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: A Cannon Carol
programme.desc: The casino staffers are busy making holiday plans, except Mike, who begins to doubt his place in Vegas, as well as in his friends' lives. A modern day Scrooge, Sam invites a client to come to the casino for the holidays.

programme.title: Las Vegas: I Could Eat a Horse
programme.desc: Danny and Mike head to Wyoming to buy a horse that Cooper wants to add to his ranch but this isn't as easy as they thought. Back at the casino, Delinda tries to find a new chef for the restaurant.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 3 Babies, 100 Guns and a Fat Chick
programme.desc: When a fugitive arrives at the Montecito, FBI agents and bounty hunters hope to make a capture. Mike, Danny and Cooper step in, and end up fighting for their lives. Also, Piper throws a post-New Year's Eve party.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Secrets, Lies and Lamaze
programme.desc: Piper gets himself in trouble with the gaming commission, but Cooper bails her out to the tune of $1-million, making the staffers suspicious of his actions. Sam and manicurist Polly get caught speeding and sentenced to traffic school.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast
programme.desc: Sam helps her 'whales' destroy any evidence that they went to a strip club. Meanwhile, Mike and Piper try to lure a hot new bartender to work at the Montecito. Elsewhere, Cooper challenges Danny to find ways to bring in more clientele.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 2 on 2
programme.desc: Piper's skills are put to the test when she is nominated for the 'Concierge of the Year' award. Meanwhile, Danny and Mike find themselves in over their heads upon entering a 2 on 2-basketball competition.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Win, Place, Bingo
programme.desc: Cooper, Danny and Mike are suspicious of a guy named Pete Skinner who is betting on horses and has a seemingly perfect winning streak. Meanwhile, Sam's 'whale' brings his grandmother 'Robby' with him to the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Three Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Danny, Piper and Mitch are taken hostage when thieves attempt to steal a rare stamp that is up for auction at the Montecito. During an unexpected dinner with Cooper, Delinda takes the opportunity to try to get to know the mysterious owner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Land to Sea
programme.desc: Guy samples from the land and the sea, including stops in Syracuse and Kitty Hawk.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Matches Made in Heaven
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's meeting up with credible combos. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the barbecue joint mashin' up a variety of styles for their unique wings and their big time beef ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up
programme.desc: A Chicago brewhouse serves up beer to go with mussels, a brisket sandwich and headcheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Everyday Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting the road and taking a detour to find some out-of-the-ordinary eats. In Chico, California, a Hawaiian-Asian fusion spot serving up righteous ramen and a fried chicken bao.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soup, Salad and Seafood
programme.desc: Guy's dives into classic comfort foods in Kansas City and in Franklin, Tennessee.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Bacon And Bbq
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., a funky farm-to-table spot piles up a pimento cheeseburger and homemade brats. In Napa, Calif., an amazing Asian joint cooks up kimchi fried rice and pork ramen. In San Antonio, Texas, Guy stops for some bomb barbecue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handcrafted
programme.desc: Guy checks in on tasty joints run by food fanatics, including a farm-to-table spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far Out
programme.desc: Guy hones in on spots that are doing it different in Syracuse and in Hoboken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Staples
programme.desc: Guy's traveling all over the country searching for a taste of the South.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Open 24/7
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes 'round the clock at some places with great food at any hour of the day.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mama's Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy visits a dive in Oklahoma serving wings and waffles and a Polish joint in L.A.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Haunts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's takin' a spin through the town favourites. In Chatham, N.J., the real deal Italian joint bakin' up some righteous fried chicken, arancini balls and the decadent sacred swine sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh and Funky
programme.desc: Host Guy Fieri visits one of his favourite ocean-side spots serving up fresh Dungeness crab in San Francisco, CA. Also, in Charlotte, NC, where they boil turkeys and finally in Reno, NV where they make fresh granola.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Keepin' It Real
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the Asian fusion spot delivers the bomb dot com brussels sprouts, and goes all out ducky on the sous vide sammie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Guy is heading out to check in on family-run favorites. In Honolulu, a set of siblings are ready to roll their mom's Filipino food all around the island. Then, in San Diego, a taquaria has been serving taquitos the same way for three generations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Guy's Going Home
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hittin' up some of his favourite hometown haunts. First, he pops into a Mexican joint right in his Santa Rosa, Calif., 'hood, where he chows on the pozole every time he's off the road.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Beef, Barbecue And Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip is all about the three B's: beef, barbecue and bar food. First, he stops in Taylor, Texas, at one of the first DDD barbecue joints to pay homage to an old friend whose son is carrying on his legacy.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Giada's Thank-You Lunch
programme.desc: Giada hosts an elegant outdoor lunch made with fresh garden ingredients to thank some of her friends and family for the special things they've done for her. The menu includes crispy goat cheese salad and Moroccan lemon chicken.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Breaking Bread for Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is making bread shine in this sweet and savory brunch. First up, a Southwestern cornbread strata served with a creamy, spicy tomato sauce, and then a crisp crushed grape sangria to cool things off.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: French to Make at Home
programme.desc: Ina has all the tricks for cooking French at home with secrets to a show.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bacon, Bacon, Bacon: Bacon Makes Everything Better
programme.desc: Valerie's friend Jo Stougaard, an authority on the deliciousness of bacon comes over, so Valerie's bringing her 'A' game with an all-bacon menu! She whips up bacon-wrapped jalapeno shrimp with cherry cola.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All Work and Some Play
programme.desc: Ree fixes the crew some homemade glazed doughnuts and later she delivers a rib sticking lunch of ranch chicken sandwiches to the workers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Color, Color, Color
programme.desc: Ree shares four vibrant recipes to celebrate the colors of summer. There's crisp, delicious Asian noodle salad, blueberry nectarine crisp and fabulous strawberry ice cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Girl Time and Burger Time
programme.desc: The cowgirls enjoy pasta primavera before making bacon cheeseburgers for everyone.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 3
programme.desc: Ree puts a spin on two family favourites in her quick and easy spinach artichoke chicken, she makes a crisp parmesan salad bowl, and her shortcut pretzel dogs are officially Ladd-approved. She finishes off on a sweet note with 'fried' ice cream.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Pizza Friday Forever
programme.desc: Molly Yeh shares some of her all-time favourite pizza recipes for a slice of variety. She makes sausage pan pizza then turns tacos into pizza with her taco pizza al pastor pie. For on-the-go eating she makes sausage and broccolini pizza pockets.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Reunited and It Tastes So Good
programme.desc: Some of the best reunions are last minute – life gets so busy, but we still want to make time for our friends! Today, my pal Mackenzie Phillips and I are having a spontaneous get-together, and I'm prepping a few dishes that are quick but super impressive.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Rustic Elegance
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's talented chef friends improvise some beautiful dishes that can only be described as sophisticated funk. Marc Murphy grills oranges for a Boulevardier cocktail and serves fire-roasted figs over vanilla bean ice cream.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Mama Mia, What a Meatball!
programme.desc: Inspired by his mom's cooking, Michael Symon masters chicken parmesan meatballs on the grill. Later, Symon's wife Liz joins him to cook soft polenta over their fire pit. Then, Liz makes a simple vinegar and cream dressing for Michael's mom's garden salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: The Kitchen heads outdoors as the hosts get their grill ready for spring and put some grilling gadgets to the test in a Tool Takedown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Amazing Italian
programme.desc: If there's one thing Guy Fieri could eat all day, it's Italian food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Vegas Greats
programme.desc: Guy hits up a diverse roster of totally righteous Vegas joints pulling out all the stops, like out-of-this world finger foods, a generations-old butcher shop and the legendary spot that was one of DDD's very first restaurants.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Guy checks out the country for an incredible variety of chicken dishes and somehow every new plate offers a twist on the traditional bird. From garlic chicken to stuffed Native American-style tacos and barbeque wings, Guy finds the chicken.

programme.title: UFC Live: Nunes vs. Spencer Pre-Show
UFC 250
programme.desc: Two-division UFC champion Amanda Nunes will return to 145 pounds to defend her UFC women's featherweight crown against top contender Felicia Spencer at UFC 250. Preliminaries
