programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Mouth Hole/ Hot Garbage
programme.desc: Robin goes on a mission to learn how to whistle. The Titans learn a valuable lesson about garbage when they try to get Beast Boy to clean his room.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Robin Backwards/ Crazy Day
programme.desc: Bizarro world Robin shows up in Jump City and the Titans keep an eye on him to make sure he's not up to something. Raven is left to fight on her own when the others decide it's 'crazy day'.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Countdown/ The Nobody
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin discover they have an uninvited house guest. Things keep going missing in the house, so it’s up to Gumball and Darwin to find the culprit.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Downer/ The Egg
programme.desc: Nicole arranges a playdate for Anais with the son of a classy lady she met at the supermarket.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Triangle/ The Money
programme.desc: Darwin joins the school marching band, and his tin-whistle talent lands him the solo. Gumball misses having his friend to goof off with and tries to get rehearsal cancelled.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Return
programme.desc: It’s the first day back at school, but Gumball and Darwin are nowhere to be seen.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Nemesis
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin come face-to-face with their arch-nemesis -- or at least someone who’s trying to be.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: The Battle Turns for the Worst! Cell Attacks Android 18
programme.desc: Vegeta's arrogance and Krillin's affection for Android 18 help Cell get one step closer to achieving perfect form.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Z Kai: The Tables Are Turned! Witness the Power of Perfection
programme.desc: After foolishly allowing Cell to absorb Android 18 and achieve his perfect form, Vegeta is shocked to discover he is now no match for the formidable monster.

programme.title: American Dad!: Anchorfran
programme.desc: Francine sets out to help news anchor Greg when he and Terry split up. Roger becomes obsessed with a fictional boy from an old game called Dream Phone.

programme.title: American Dad!: The Dentist's Wife
programme.desc: Roger loses his identity after becoming fascinated by a local dentist's wife. Meanwhile, Klaus throws a party when Stan and the kids are unable to move from being sore after working out.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Tina Tailor Soldier Spy
programme.desc: Tina goes undercover in her old Thundergirls troop to find the mole who is giving away their cookie secrets. Meanwhile, Linda dyes her hair blonde.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Star Mort Rickturn of the Jerri
programme.desc: Parenting is crazy broh. Stuff straight disappearin in this one.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Giggity Wife
programme.desc: When Peter, Quagmire and Joe visit the Harvard University campus, Quagmire accidentally marries a prostitute. In order to get out of his marriage, Quagmire pretends to be lovers with Peter.

programme.title: Family Guy: Chris Cross
programme.desc: To buy new sneakers, Chris steals money from Lois' purse. When Meg catches him in the act, she forces him to do all of her chores in exchange for keeping mum.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Let it Flow! School Festival!
programme.desc: After his encounter with Gentleman and La Brava, Izuku tries desperately to make it back for the school festival for the performance.

programme.title: Paranoia Agent: MHz
programme.desc: The investigation of the attack on Taeko becomes complicated when Ikari realizes Kozuka is slotted to be the next victim.

programme.title: Mob Psycho 100: Ochimusha: Psychic Powers and Me
programme.desc: Mob is challenged to a one-on-one fight with Black Vinegar Middle School's shadow leader Hanazawa Teruki, otherwise known as Teru. Mob doesn't use his powers but Teru goes all out on him destroying everything around him.

programme.title: Black Clover: Dawn
programme.desc: With the kingdom still in turmoil, and the elves set on revenge the Party looks within to find the answer.

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind: Verso il Colosseo di Roma
programme.desc: While Bruno and the team analyze face and fingerprints left behind they receive a mysterious call. The team must race to the Colosseum if they ever want to defeat the Boss.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden: The Acknowledged One
programme.desc: Itachi joins Killer Bee to fight Nagato who is still under Kabuto's control, while Naturo fights to keep his soul.

programme.title: Ballmastrz: 9009: Don't Let a Big Head Give You the Championship Blues! You Can Do It, Leptons! Try Your Best to Win
programme.desc: The Leptons face their most ruthless foe yet while dealing with Ace’s selfishness. Tensions boil over until neither team can handle it any longer.

programme.title: Ballmastrz: 9009: Onward, True Blue Friends Win Eternal; Paladin of the Heavens, Start Today!
programme.desc: A terrifying figure from Gaz’s past threatens the unity of the team. It will take a surprise threat to bring the team back together.

programme.title: The Shivering Truth: Beast of Both Worlds
programme.desc: Is man punishing itself for some perceived guilt?

programme.title: The Shivering Truth: Chaos Beknownst
programme.desc: Loosely-linked emotional parables that crawled out of the deepest caverns of your mind.

programme.title: The Boondocks: I Dream of Siri
programme.desc: Granddad loves Siri on his new iPhone. Unfortunately, she loves him back, a bit too much. When she becomes obsessed with him, Granddad finds that Siri is one app that won’t be deleted that easily.

programme.title: The Venture Bros.: The Rorqual Affair
programme.desc: Deadly waters surround the Monarch when he becomes Wide Wale’s prisoner.

programme.title: Aqua TV Show Show: Muscles
programme.desc: After a health scare lands Shake in the hospital, he decides to get into shape by chugging an illegal fitness beverage.

programme.title: Aqua TV Show Show: The Dudies
programme.desc: Shake enlists Carl's help in training for the title of 'coolest dude ever'.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Tina Tailor Soldier Spy
programme.desc: Tina goes undercover in her old Thundergirls troop to find the mole who is giving away their cookie secrets. Meanwhile, Linda dyes her hair blonde.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Smile Bones/ Real Boy Adventures
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: Kung Fu Master/ A Battle of Popularity
programme.desc: Dan’s first match-up of the Bakugan battle league is the Chinese Champion Brawler: Zhao. His opponent is a deeply focused, and serious brawler, who uses Kung Fu techniques in battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Cyberverse: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Autobots and Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Cyberverse: The Other One
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Autobots and Decepticons.

programme.title: Power Players: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Axel seems normal, but he can transform! Join him in recruiting a team of toy heroes!

programme.title: Power Players: Green with Envy
programme.desc: Axel seems normal, but he can transform! Join him in recruiting a team of toy heroes!

programme.title: Ben 10: A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: All Ben wants to do is stop Queen Bee from robbing a bank, but when Kevin shows up to try and be the hero and take all the glory himself, Ben will need to save the day twice or end up in hot honey.

programme.title: Ben 10: What Rhymes with Omnitrix?
programme.desc: At a poetry slam event, Charmcaster's reading of Kevin's poetry causes magical trouble for Ben and Gwen, causing mind swaps that have everyone confused as to who's fighting who.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Crew
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin attempt to join the baddest crew in town.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Others
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are shocked to realise that their class isn’t the only one in Elmore Junior High.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Signature
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Dad tries to stop Granny Jojo getting married.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Wicked
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin try to find a single nice quality about their neighbour, Mrs Robinson.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Origins: Part One
programme.desc: The origin story of how Darwin ended up with the Wattersons.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Origins: Part Two
programme.desc: Having been accidentally flushed down the toilet, Darwin has to find his way back to his new family.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Apprentice
programme.desc: Gumball sets out to prove to Penny's father that he's good enough for his daughter.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Gift
programme.desc: It's Masami's birthday, but his friends don't know what to get the cloud who has everything.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Agent
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin’s clothes go missing after a swimming lesson, and Gumball is forced to wear a tuxedo from the lost and found office. He believes it makes him look like a certain dapper British secret agent.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Decisions
programme.desc: When everything goes wrong in Darwin’s life, he begins to suspect that Gumball’s bad influence might be to blame. Darwin decides to go elsewhere for guidance and finds a new mentor in Alan.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Pest
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin help Anais deal with someone who’s bothering her at school.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Traitor
programme.desc: When Alan ditches Gumball to do something more fun, Gumball is desperate to track him down and make him pay for his betrayal.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Hug
programme.desc: An impromptu hug with a stranger at school leaves Gumball in an increasingly awkward social situation.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Advice
programme.desc: Mr. Small feels that he hasn’t inspired the children of Elmore Junior High, so Gumball and Darwin try to lift his spirits.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Yearbook Madness/ Hose Water
programme.desc: When Beast Boy and Cyborg decide to make a Titans yearbook, Robin decides to do whatever it takes to be the most popular.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Operation Tin Man/ Nean
programme.desc: Raven is cursed to be nice; meanwhile, Starfire is about to marry a pot of chili.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Rocks and Water/ Multiple Trick Pony
programme.desc: Robin insists he's a multiple trick pony. Then, Raven and Beast Boy are shocked to discover that their exes are now dating each other.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Truth, Justice, and What?/ Beast Man
programme.desc: Pizza is the source of the Titans' goofy humor; Beast Boy discovers he can transform into an adult man.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Two Bumble Bees and a Wasp/ Oil Drums
programme.desc: When Robin tries to teach the others to have more respect for money, he ends up learning a lesson. Cyborg is looking forward to a marathon of 80's television shows, but the remote appears to be lost.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Video Game References/ Cool School
programme.desc: Rose Wilson escapes from prison, defeating the Titans with cool one liners. Only Raven is immune to Rose's insults, and the two decide to hang out and do cool stuff together. Cyborg, Starfire and Beast Boy go to Cool School.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Kicking a Ball and Pretending to Be Hurt/ Head Fruit
programme.desc: Robin suggests that Beast Boy find a hobby to prevent his brain from shrinking. Beast Boy and his brain decide to take up gardening.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Let's Get Serious/ Tamaranian Vacation
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #TweenTitans
programme.desc: Diana, Kara, and Barbara do more than save citizens from Super-Villains.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #EmperorPenguin
programme.desc: Diana, Kara, and Barbara do more than save citizens from Super-Villains.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sale
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin do everything they can to stop Mr. Robinson selling his house.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Signal
programme.desc: Gumball develops a strange stutter, and it makes him accidentally offend Darwin.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Bottle of Wine and a Jackhammer
programme.desc: When Lindsey asks Alan to move in with her, Charlie will do anything to get Alan to say 'yes.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pudding-Filled Cactus
programme.desc: Alan moves in with Lyndsey but continues to have a rendezvous with Melissa at Charlie's house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hookers, Hookers, Hookers
programme.desc: Lyndsey and Eldridge move into Charlie's house after Alan burns down their home.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Immortal Mr. Billy Joel
programme.desc: Alan goes out on the town, pretending to be Charlie, while Charlie sneaks off for some cosmetic surgery.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Grandma's Pie
programme.desc: Walden breaks the news to Zoey that he is going into business with his ex-wife. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey try to come to terms with their moms' new relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Crazy Bitch Gazette
programme.desc: Charlie's past comes back to bite him when his girlfriend decides that his stalker, Rose, is just too much to handle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Springtime on a Stick
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan try to set Evelyn up with Russell, the pharmacist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Good Time in Central Africa
programme.desc: When Berta takes a couple of days off, Charlie falls for her replacement. Meanwhile, Alan believes he's being stalked by Lyndsey's ex-husband.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ow, Ow, Don't Stop
programme.desc: Charlie goes on a spending spree for his old fling, Courtney, who shows up after three years in prison for conning him out of money.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dead From the Waist Down
programme.desc: Alan gets creative when he discovers that he can't afford to buy Lyndsey a nice birthday present.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Chocolate Diddlers or My Puppy's Dead
programme.desc: Charlie falls into a depression after his break-up with Courtney and goes to see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Skunk, Dog Crap and Ketchup
programme.desc: When Charlie and Lyndsey start becoming friendly, Alan's paranoia gets the best of him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lookin' for Japanese Subs
programme.desc: Charlie's obsession with the newly 'married' Rose leads him to stalk her. Meanwhile, Alan grows concerned when Jake and Eldridge start videotaping stupid and extremely dangerous stunts.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Hookers and a Philly Cheesesteak
programme.desc: While Charlie and Rose carry on their 'affair,' Alan's chiropractic business turns into a Ponzi scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Darn Priest
programme.desc: Rose uncovers Alan's Ponzi scheme and Alan, in turn, meets 'Manny,' Rose's mannequin 'husband.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nice to Meet You, Walden Schmidt
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher joins the cast as Walden Schmidt, an Internet billionaire with a broken heart.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: People Who Love Peepholes
programme.desc: Berta moves into Alan's room as he prepares to leave his Malibu house and Walden enlists Alan's help to confront his ex-wife.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Girls Don't Throw Food
programme.desc: Alan prepares Walden for a date with Bridget, while Jake decides to emulate Walden and drop out of school.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nine Magic Fingers

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd and Chase are forced to experience the great outdoors when Grayson insists on going camping. While the guys 'rough it' in a luxury RV and terrify Grayson with stories of a haunted lake, Savannah and Julie must go back to driving school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Still Chrisley After All These Years

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Midnight Murders
programme.desc: Carla Stefaniak, a spirited Florida insurance agent with a passion for travel, heads to Costa Rica. But on the day she's supposed to return, she vanishes. And in 2014, 19-year-old college student Pravin Varughese disappears after a party.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Gone Girls
programme.desc: In July, 2018, 25-year-old Danniella Vian, a young mother from Mobile, Alabama, disappears into thin air. And then 19-year-old Holly Moore's suspicious death still raises questions four years after her body is found hanging from her closet.

programme.title: Southwest of Salem: The Story of the San Antonio Four
programme.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of gang-raping two little girls during the 'Satanic Panic' of the '80s and '90s, four Latina lesbians fight against mythology, homophobia and prosecutorial fervor in their struggle for freedom.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Letter From San Quentin
programme.desc: Kevin Cooper was sentenced to death for the murders of four people in the Chino Hills massacre of 1983, but as investigators look back at the DNA evidence, more questions are raised about Cooper's possible innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Was Kevin Cooper Framed?
programme.desc: '48 Hours' investigates whether new DNA evidence can save the life of a man on death row for killing four people in California. Twenty years ago he wrote '48 Hours' claiming he was framed, and new tests may answer that question.

programme.title: Southwest of Salem: The Story of the San Antonio Four
programme.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of gang-raping two little girls during the 'Satanic Panic' of the '80s and '90s, four Latina lesbians fight against mythology, homophobia and prosecutorial fervor in their struggle for freedom.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in the Sutton Place Apartment?
programme.desc: It's a story of wealth, privilege, and an early morning after-party that went terribly wrong. Erin Moriarty explores the last night of Joey Comunale's life and the cases against two privileged young men for taking part in a murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Grapes of Wrath
programme.desc: It was a business deal right out of a Hollywood movie. An investor in a Napa Valley winery ponied up $800,000 cash in an effort to make a fortune in fine wine. What he didn't realize then was he was investing in his own murder. Tracy Smith reports.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The Mall Killings
programme.desc: Not all killers prowl lonely places. In Florida there is one killer who hunts where many of us go every day. In March and December 2007 two women were shot dead as they left the same shopping mall.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The Phantom of Civil Theater
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Lewiston, Idaho, an eerie local theatre has dark past. Three people went missing here, two turned up dead. Is it a local killer, connected to a string of other murders? The team from Dark Minds dive into a deep mystery.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Impossible Perpetrator
programme.desc: When teen Candace Hiltz is shot dead in Prison Valley, the cops pursue her troubled brother James. With no evidence against him, the case goes cold until ten years later when a cop's storage unit is discovered to contain evidence in Candace's murder.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: They Call Me Animal
programme.desc: After three teens vanish, a Texas town's worst fears are realized when they're found dead. Details of a related robbery identify a suspect, but after a rattling jailbreak, the city must mobilize the largest manhunt in state history to nab the culprit.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: A loving mother is shot three times at a gas station in Memphis, Tennessee. As police search for clues, a mysterious letter threatens to complicate the already-tense relationship between local law enforcement and the community they've sworn to protect.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: The Sinner
programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Creek Runs Red
programme.desc: After a Tennessee fisherman finds a woman's body floating in a creek, family secrets, decades-long feuds, and a suspicious funeral shine light on a complex conspiracy. But the truth is far more shocking than anyone could have ever imagined.

programme.title: American Monster: Wave to Daddy
programme.desc: The daughter of one of America's most notorious killers gives an exclusive interview, taking us on a journey into the eyes of a cold-blooded monster. Never-before-seen footage reveals the devastating double life of a murderer and his horrific crimes.

programme.title: American Monster: Just Out of Frame
programme.desc: A fun-loving couple, both business-owners, share a close relationship with their grown daughters. So when the mother is found gruesomely bludgeoned to death in her own home, no one suspects the unthinkable. But unlike guilty people, video doesn't lie.

programme.title: American Monster: A Mother's Work
programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: Sam Giancana: Mafia vs. CIA
programme.desc: We reveal the secrets of the Mafia's most notorious members, beginning with Sam Giancana, who was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra, and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Mob Boss: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence, but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: The Mob Rat: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ballard

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Keeping the Dreams Alive
programme.desc: Chase and the team will have their hands full as they navigate the treacherous hillside while they stabilize the camp and restore it so the family can continue to enjoy it for at least another 42 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Shaw Camp Re-Imagination
programme.desc: Following a two-year search, Greg and Denise uncovered their 'diamond in the rough' when they purchased a cabin that was untouched for years on the beautiful shore of Messalonskee Lake in Sidney.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work to dismantle a barn built by Abe Lincoln's uncle around 1830.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Big Ol' Buckeye Cabin
programme.desc: The builders have never seen a log home as large as this Ohio cabin. They discovery it's filled with history, craftsmanship and a lot of cherished memories. Mark also gives the cabin owner tips on how to convert the bar into a modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Pristine Hand-Hewn Logs from a West Virginia Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to the heart of West Virginia, to salvage incredibly rare 170-year-old logs from a perfectly preserved log home. The pressure is on to keep these logs pristine as they take them down.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding the 100% Cabin and Restoring a Legacy
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the 100% cabin to South Carolina where they rebuild it as a hunting cabin. While they are there, they work with the client's kids to build a camping cabin out of their ancestor's log home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Victory Lap
programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Oat Cuisine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2001 with new recipes for his favourite grain, including a no-cook overnight oat pudding and a flavor-charged granola, now with more nutrition!

programme.title: Cake Wars: Shrek
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite ogre is making his way to Cake Wars, Shrek himself! DreamWorks Animation is throwing a massive party to celebrate the 15th Anniversary of the iconic animated film, and Shrek producer Gina Shay is on hand to judge the bakers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Austin
programme.desc: The food in Austin can get a little weird but that's a compliment in a city where funky is part of the pioneer spirit.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Mexico
programme.desc: The frontier spirit can still be found in New Mexico even when it comes to the food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Los Angeles, California, is the capital of stardom, and that includes its cuisine. In a city known for such edible icons as Korean tacos and the L.A. street dog, Andrew Zimmern explores just what makes this destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hong Kong
programme.desc: The city of Hong Kong's seven million residents flock to its many restaurants, street carts, and noodle houses daily. From dim sum to congee to roast goose, Andrew Zimmern finds out just what makes this destination so delicious!

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Orange County, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb cruises into Orange County, California, to take down a three-pound burger slathered in a sauce made from three of the spiciest peppers on the planet.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Abracadabra! Wizard Fafnir!
Yo-Kai Watch: The One in the Water/ Why Did You Say That?/ Katie's Secret
programme.desc: Nate investigates reports of a mysterious creature in the local river, and confronts Tattletell, a Yo-kai who makes people spill embarrassing secrets.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Battling Besties!
programme.desc: As the Alola Pokémon League marches on, friends and rivals alike give it their all!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Aunt Cass Goes Out
programme.desc: After Aunt Cass nearly figures out Hiro’s secret life as a member of Big Hero 6, Hiro plays matchmaker to find Aunt Cass a boyfriend to distract her.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: LOL the Vote
programme.desc: Chance is hoping to be voted 'class clown' for a record breaking fourth year in a row, but finds out Bailey is also vying for the title. Dusty is vying for 'most academic.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Grandma's Here to Stay
programme.desc: Dusty is stressed when his Grandma moves into his house and is now sharing a room with him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Blind Date
programme.desc: The gang finds out that Uncle Will has, unknowingly, been set up on a blind date with Bailey's mom. Meanwhile, a target is hired to be on-air talent for a home shopping network owned by Chance's dad.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Walk the Prank: Adventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: The team enlists Disney Channel Original Movie's 'Adventures in Babysitting' stars, Sofia Carson and Sabrina Carpenter, to help prank a few babysitters.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Up All-Nighter
programme.desc: Facing a morning deadline, the crew pulls an all-nighter at Uncle Will's to edit the pranks and upload them to their channel in time. Meanwhile, Herman poses as a kid who thinks he's a medieval knight and convinces his babysitter to do whatever he says.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: So You Think You Can Middle School Dance
programme.desc: It's Herman's first school dance and the gang tries to teach him the ropes, but Herman ends up teaching them instead. Meanwhile, Uncle Will's mom is famous for her gigantic turkeys. Will invites a guest over a feast he won't soon forget.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party Hearty
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Allowance Drama
programme.desc: Hilarity continues when Uncle Will and the kids bring a Loch Ness Pool Monster to life and stage a fake game show 'Date My Mom!' to prank a contestant with a series of gross and wild challenges.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Can't Crush This
programme.desc: Herman is thrilled to discover that the new girl at school likes him, but is devastated when she quickly changes her mind and turns her affections elsewhere.

programme.title: World of X Games: 2020 Anthology Part 1
programme.desc: Top Moments from X Games Aspen 2020.

programme.title: World of X Games: X Games Aspen 2020 Being Series
programme.desc: The Being Series profiles established action sports athletes at the top of their game, in sport and in life. The athletes featured in the upcoming Being Series are Max Parrot, Danny Davis, Kelly Sildaru and Henrik Harlaut.

programme.title: World of X Games: 2020 Anthology Part 2
programme.desc: Top moments from X Games Aspen 2020.

programme.title: E:60: Alex Smith: Project 11
programme.desc: An exclusive look inside Washington quarterback Alex Smith's recovery from a 2018 leg injury that nearly cost him his life. Smith opens up about flesh-eating bacteria, limb salvage measures and what it was like to throw a football again.

programme.title: Cycle of Health
programme.desc: Explores stories of personal triumph over major health challenges.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Chocolate
programme.desc: Follow the semi-finalists as they come to grips with chocolate, a temperamental ingredient. The Signature task is chocolate tart, followed by chocolate soufflé in the Technical challenge. For the Showstopper, the bakers create chocolate centerpieces.

programme.title: Les Misérables 25th Anniversary Concert at the O2
programme.desc: In honour the 25th anniversary of Les Misérables, producer Cameron Mackintosh stages a concert featuring music from the show. The show is performed from the O2 Arena in London.

programme.title: The Tunnel
programme.desc: The team are forced to strike a deal with Vanessa. Meanwhile, someone tries to warn Karl off the case and Elise crosses a line she may quickly come to regret.

programme.title: The Tunnel
programme.desc: When Karl and Elise reach a dead end in the case, they both resort to unconventional means.

programme.title: The Tunnel

programme.title: The Tunnel
programme.desc: Karl and Elise face a tense and gripping showdown with the Pied Piper. There is also closure at last for Charlie Moreau, as Karl and Olivier uncover the truth about his abduction.

programme.title: Live From Lincoln Center: Falsettos
programme.desc: A poignant and hilarious look at a modern family set amidst the emerging AIDS crisis. Christian Borle stars as Marvin, with Stephanie J. Block as his ex-wife, Trina, and Andrew Rannells as his lover, Whizzer.

programme.title: Symphony for Nature: The Britt Orchestra at Crater Lake
programme.desc: More than 130 musicians perform at Crater Lake National Park in Oregon in July 2016.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Balance Your Body
programme.desc: Mary Ann showcases a workout designed to balance out the body to improve functional fitness.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Funky Seventies Problem/ The Umbrella Problem
programme.desc: Peg's grandparents love groovy '60s tunes, but their pet goats only want '70s funk. Peg and Cat search for their umbrellas, which they need for measuring puddle depth and singing in the rain.

programme.title: Cyberchase: A Broom of One's Own
programme.desc: Matt, Jackie, Inez and Digit ensure that Wicked's 'Wickedy Brooms' are not poor quality.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Reading the Mud/ Unsinkable Molly
programme.desc: Molly and Tooey must track down one of Connie's prized turkeys. And, Molly, Tooey and Trini decide to build a sailboat and voyage to distant waters.

programme.title: Nova: Bigger Than T.Rex
programme.desc: Almost a century ago, paleontologists found fossil bones from a dinosaur that was bigger than Tyrannosaurus rex. New bones in Morocco have reopened the investigation into this epic beast. Paleontologists reconstruct the carnivore.

programme.title: History Detectives: Dylan Goes Electric, Beatles Autograph & Frank Zappa Collage
programme.desc: An electric Fender Stratocaster may be the one that Bob Dylan plugged in at the 1965 Newport Folk Festival. The origin of some autographs allegedly signed during the Beatles' legendary 1964 tour of America is determined.

programme.title: Magical Land of Oz: Land
programme.desc: A look at one of the most magical lands on the planet. Its unique wildlife includes tree-dwelling kangaroos, spiders that survive under water and a bird that spreads fire.

programme.title: Life From Above: Colorful Planet
programme.desc: View Earth’s kaleidoscope of colors as seen from space. Swirls of turquoise phytoplankton trigger an oceanic feeding frenzy, China turns yellow as millions of flowers bloom, and at night the waters near Argentina are spotted with green lights.

programme.title: Nova: Bigger Than T.Rex
programme.desc: Almost a century ago, paleontologists found fossil bones from a dinosaur that was bigger than Tyrannosaurus rex. New bones in Morocco have reopened the investigation into this epic beast. Paleontologists reconstruct the carnivore.

programme.title: Genius by Stephen Hawking: What Are We?
programme.desc: Scientist Stephen Hawking challenges three ordinary people to find out what we really are. Self-assembling machines, light-up bacteria and the world’s first physical demonstration of evolution in action conspire to revolutionize their view of life.

programme.title: The Great American Read: Villains & Monsters
programme.desc: Learn why literature's most notorious villains began behaving badly. Many weren't born evil, but became that way when faced with some of the same choices we make every day. See what these villains can teach us about our own dark impulses.

programme.title: Civilizations: Encounters
programme.desc: See how advances in seafaring and a thirst for trade and exploration sent human beings around the planet. Distant and disparate cultures met for the first time, and art became the great interface by which civilizations understood each other.

programme.title: Reconstruction: America After the Civil War
programme.desc: Experience the aftermath of the Civil War — a bewildering, exhilarating and terrifying time. African Americans who had played a crucial role in the war now grapple with the terms and implications of Reconstruction and their hard-won freedom.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Star-Struck Victims

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Imposter

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Spellbound
programme.desc: The SVU investigates a charismatic spiritual healer when a client claims he incapacitated and assaulted her using hypnosis.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: American Dream

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Flight Risk
programme.desc: An airline pilot accuses her captain of sexual assault so Barbra convenes a Grand Jury to determine their employer's complicity in the crime. Fin ensures that Benson is protected at work.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Hero

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Martin takes steps to ensure that he gets on Varnel Hill's talk show.

programme.title: Martin: Thanks for Nothing
programme.desc: Thanksgiving gets interesting when Martin's relatives and Gina's parents come to dinner.

programme.title: Martin: Whoop There It Ain't
programme.desc: Pam challenges Gina and Martin to see if they can abstain from having sex for two weeks.

programme.title: Martin: Holiday Blues
programme.desc: Gina is homesick at Christmas time.

programme.title: Martin: No Justice, No Peace
programme.desc: Martin gets a traffic ticket and turns it into a Federal case when he decides to fight it.

programme.title: Martin: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: When Martin's CD Walkman disappears, he accuses all of his good friends of taking it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part One)
programme.desc: Gina is offered a job in New York and Martin, taking advice from Stan, tells her to take it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)
programme.desc: With Gina out of his life, Martin reconsiders his decision to let her go to New York to move on with her life, and he sets out to win her back.

programme.title: Martin: Arms Are for Hugging
programme.desc: Martin and Gina admit that they are fighting and arguing too much, so they seek the help of a church Minister for counselling.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill
programme.desc: After winning a charity boxing match, Martin thinks he is as good a fighter as anyone. After Tommy Hearns makes advances towards Gina, Martin challenges the boxer to a 10-round grudge match.

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: Martin: I Don't Have the Heart
programme.desc: Pam starts dating an older, wealthy man who eventually asks her to marry him.

programme.title: Martin: Crunchy Drawers
programme.desc: Martin has a dream in which he's attracted to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: No Love Lost
programme.desc: A fight between Martin and Gina before their engagement party threatens the evening.

programme.title: Martin: The Hoe Down in Motown
programme.desc: When the IRS busts Stan, he is forced to sell the radio station. When the new owner takes over, he turns it into a country and western station, and Martin tries to adapt.

programme.title: Martin: Martin's on the Move
programme.desc: Depressed, Martin leaves Detroit to find himself but doesn't tell Gina where he is going.

programme.title: Martin: In Search of ... Martin
programme.desc: Gina and the gang learn of Martin's whereabouts through a cancelled cheque.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: Friends and Family Hustle: Trials & Tribulations
programme.desc: Toya, facing her brothers’ murder trial, is forced to confront her past. Letoya is ready to get back into music but Tommi gets in the way. Tip & Tiny get shocking news when Tip’s mother reveals that she might be tying the knot.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly are looking forward to their big day. After their overbooked wedding venue reserves the wrong date, they have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A young woman falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with injury.

programme.title: Good Witch: The Dream
programme.desc: Sam successfully operates on Adam, but not without complications. Joy dreams that Abigail and Donovan break up, and against Cassie's advice, tries to stop it from happening.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story
programme.desc: When the girls learn that a number of relatives are going to be visiting, they reminisce about times they've had to share a bed and strange places they've had to sleep, including a train station.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father
programme.desc: Blanche and Rose plan a nice dinner at the house for Dorothy and her new boyfriend, who she later learns is a priest. She later gets another shock when she learns he plans to leave the church.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Long Day's Journey Into Marinara
programme.desc: Sophia's sister, Angela arrives in Miami for a visit and decides to move there but while she's looking for an apartment Dorothy invites her to stay with the girls. This ticks off Sophia since she thinks that Angela is after everything that she has.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?
programme.desc: Blanche is convinced that her beauty is fading after attending her high school reunion and discovers many of her classmates have had face lifts. Meanwhile, Rose is making a home movie for class she's taking.

programme.title: Frasier: The Ring Cycle
programme.desc: Daphne prompts Niles into a spur of the moment ceremony in the city of romance, Reno.

programme.title: Frasier: Enemy at the Gate
programme.desc: Frasier embarks on an act of disobedience when he squares-off against a parking garage.

programme.title: Frasier: Proxy Prexy
programme.desc: Frasier installs his father Martin as the puppet leader in a bid for condominium control.

programme.title: Frasier: Kissing Cousin
programme.desc: When Roz's cousin blows into town, Frasier seems unable to please this raging party-girl.

programme.title: Frasier: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: After Bulldog plays a harsh office prank on Frasier, he vows revenge on his old nemesis.

programme.title: Frasier: Star Mitzvah
programme.desc: In preparation for Frederick's Bar Mitzvah, Frasier makes a deal with a co-worker.

programme.title: Frasier: Bristle While You Work
programme.desc: In the search for Daphne's replacement, Frasier interviews numerous would-be housekeepers.

programme.title: Frasier: Rooms With a View
programme.desc: The Cranes spend an unexpected afternoon at the hospital.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's 'Life' Story
programme.desc: Lucy really wants a career in showbiz and upstages Ricky during one of his numbers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Girls Go Into Business
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel buy a dress shop but it ends up losing money.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy and Ethel Buy the Same Dress
programme.desc: The girls are thrilled about appearing on TV, but they both show up in the same dress.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Equal Rights
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel manage to get their husbands to agree with equal rights.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's Prized Pupil
programme.desc: Dorothy feels that it's her fault when her prized pupil wins a writing contest which inadvertently signals the INS that he’s an illegal alien.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: While Dorothy and Rose are planning a hospital charity banquet, Blanche falls for Jake, the caterer hired for the event. She quickly learns he's more blue jeans than a black tie which prompts her to foolishly put a stop to their romance.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Son-in-Law Dearest
programme.desc: Dorothy's daughter arrives after she learns that her husband is cheating on her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: To Catch a Neighbor
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors whom are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: A lifestyle show featuring special guests filmed live at Universal Studios in California.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Take Two
programme.desc: A woman moved to Los Angeles with dreams of becoming a writer. Years later, she's the producer of a reality show based around weddings. While filming on site, she runs into her ex-boyfriend, who is cast as the groom-to-be, and it sets her world on fire.

programme.title: Movie: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: A perfumer is desperate to formulate her late father's unfinished signature scent. After hiring a botanist to help, it's not long before their professional relationship turns romantic, threatening their deadline and feelings for each other.

programme.title: Movie: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A bride-to-be who is planning her wedding with a well-off doctor at a beautiful resort meets a charming local. She must decide which man she should be with: the man that can provide for her or the man that understands her.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Crème Fraiche
programme.desc: Stan's life is a shambles both at home and in school. Randy's obsession with the Food Network Is changing everything. It even forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park: Hell on Earth 2006
programme.desc: Satan and the residents of Hell rise up on Halloween for the most raging costume party ever. However, Satan's fun is threatened by the antics of the most notorious serial killers of all time.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow
programme.desc: When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer
programme.desc: All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Royal Pudding
programme.desc: The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Taming Strange
programme.desc: Kyle's brother Ike is finally growing up leading to them to lose touch. To keep things from drifting apart, Kyle takes Ike to a Yo Gabba Gabba show.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium Isn't Free
programme.desc: Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.title: South Park: Where My Country Gone?
programme.desc: Garrison wants to build a wall to keep out all of the undocumented immigrants.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: Movie: South Park: Bigger, Longer and Uncut
programme.desc: When the South Park boys hear foul words in a movie, their parents declare war on Canada.

programme.title: South Park: Goobacks
programme.desc: Humans from the year 3045 are traveling to South Park through a recently opened time portal and are looking for work. When they start taking the jobs of true, hard working Americans, the town takes drastic action to save the country.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Cartman convinces the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house. But when Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt for the horrendous prank, Cartman tries to kill him.

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: The boys of South Park produce their own morning news show on the school's closed-circuit television station and are immediately caught up in an intense competition for ratings.

programme.title: South Park: You're Getting Old
programme.desc: Just after Stan's tenth birthday, his worldviews start to change and so do his friendships.

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers
programme.desc: Cartman must find a way to deal with his Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion

programme.desc: After self-banishing, Kate is slammed by Africa's wrath. Desperately hungry, Bulent gets a major score with his bare hands but Makani must put aside her vegan beliefs. Wes and Gwen's first big food win goes wrong, threatening their health and challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Foreign Exchange: Taking on Colombia
programme.desc: European survivalists Marie and Olivier are dropped into the Colombian jungle and face a punishing 21-day challenge. Aggressive caiman, insects and extreme temperatures test their physical and mental resolve. Their journey is translated into English.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bite Club
programme.desc: A survivor of rattlesnake, shark and bear attacks teams with Brooke, wife of 'Naked and Afraid' veteran Matt Wright, in a vicious African feeding ground. Then, a haunted Colombian jungle tests survivalists with threats from predators and the supernatural.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: New Evidence

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle Exposed

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Hope Solo vs. Chyna the fan
programme.desc: Gabby Douglas goes undercover to secretly flip the script on a fan during a cheerleading competition, a baseball fan thinks they're participating in hall of fame ceremony but ends up in the hall of shame.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Connor Fields vs. Taina the Fan
programme.desc: Josh Norman goes undercover again to talk about how much he hates Josh Norman, and one fan gets a wild ride with BMX legend Connor Fields.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple-D Classics

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech is helping experts investigate the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle like never before, and as new discoveries reveal alien phenomena at the bottom of the ocean floor, they might finally uncover the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Curse of the Vampire
Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Hunting the Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: American Monster: Family Snapshot
programme.desc: The Yates family moves to Washington only to find it besieged by a serial killer who's targeting young women and confounding the police. Now, the family's never-before-aired home videos provide a chilling look of one of America's most notorious killers.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by Your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Twice Shy
programme.desc: Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like a match made in heaven, but behind the veneer of happiness hides a monster in plain sight. Loved ones close to the couple sit down for the first time on camera to make sense of a murder that none of them saw coming.

programme.desc: Police must sift through puzzling evidence and misleading accounts in order to solve a young girl's mysterious disappearance.
